title: APEX 26.1: APEXlang, AI App Generator, and a New Era of Low-Code
summary: Oracle reveals APEX 26.1 details: the new APEXlang specification lets developers describe APEX apps in natural language, while the AI Application Generator builds enterprise solutions from text prompts. Also announced: AI-powered Interactive Reports, a Global Repository for team collaboration, and an updated Universal Theme with enhanced mobile capabilities.

title: Ukraine's 1C Ban: 70–85% of Companies Still Run Prohibited Software
summary: Since January 6, 2026, Ukraine's State Service of Special Communications has officially listed 20 products by 1C and BAS as prohibited software. The ban is mandatory for government agencies, critical infrastructure, and entities handling classified data. Bill #13505, currently before Parliament, would extend the ban to all private businesses. An estimated 70–85% of Ukrainian companies still depend on these systems.

title: Oracle AI World 2026: Oracle's Premier AI Conference in Las Vegas
summary: Oracle announced AI World 2026 — the successor to CloudWorld — taking place October 25–28 at The Venetian, Las Vegas. Over 20,000 attendees expected. Focus: AI innovations in cloud infrastructure, enterprise applications, and data management. Oracle also launched the AI World Tour, a series of free one-day events in cities worldwide.

title: APEX World 2026 Kicks Off March 26–27 in the Netherlands
summary: The 16th edition of APEX World takes place March 26–27 at ReeHorst, Ede, Netherlands. Four parallel tracks with keynotes from Marc Sewtz, Monica Godoy, Menno Hoogendijk, and Connor McDonald. Early previews of APEX 26.1 features expected.
